stemHtml: An aeroplane (call sign AB139) and a helicopter (call sign AT139) are on the same approach frequency. What should ATC do to prevent call sign confusion?

options.a: Request a temporary change of one of the two call signs.
options.b: Use abbreviated call signs for both aircraft.
options.c: Continue using the existing call signs with extra caution.
options.d: Instruct both aircraft to permanently change their call signs.
